headline: Assessing Newmont (NEM) Valuation After Earnings Beats Higher Gold Prices And The Newcrest Deal
summary: Newmont (NEM) is back in focus after a run of five straight earnings beats supported by firmer gold prices, as investors weigh ongoing production and cost headwinds against its Newcrest acquisition and longer term asset focus. See our latest analysis for Newmont. At a share price of $111.85, Newmont has seen a 13.97% 1 month share price return and a 10.50% year to date share price return. Its 1 year total shareholder return of 113.18% suggests momentum has been strong, even as recent...
